title: Hidden Drawing - GPD
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ctlp5","text":"1. Draw a circle (c1).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7iqkn","text":"2. Within that circle, about a third of the way from the top draw two points.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e1s09","text":"3. Another third of the way draw a semicircle (starting at the top and curving down, then back up).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2t0pp","text":"4. from the bottom of the circle extend a line (L1) down, roughly twice the diameter of circle C1.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8fuar","text":"5. from the center of line L1, draw two lines extending up, at roughly 45 degrees from each other and centered on the orginal line.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cc5vr","text":"6. from the end of line L1, draw two lines again with roughly 45 degrees between them, centered on the original line.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"48t6j","text":"7. next to the right bottom line, draw another circle C2 (similar size to  circle C1).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"68eej","text":"8. Within this circle draw 4 pentagons, one near the top, one near the bottom, one near the left, and one near the right, having them almost touch each other.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1lrqf","text":"9. Shade in these pentagons.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"25lr0","text":"10. further to the right draw a line (L2) (parallel to the L1, starting at the same height as circle C1 and ending at the same bottom point as the circle C2.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8cujb","text":"11. from the bottom of line L2, draw a perpendicular line (L3) to the right, about 1/2 the length of L2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fiuba","text":"12. Connect the top of L2 with the end of line L3 with an arc.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"417p6","text":"13. Add some medium cross hatching to this shape. (cross hatching is perpendicular lines that fill the interior of the shape).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
